sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 53:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 53:1
items.html: The connection of the two Heys is permanent, but the difference between them is only regarding the concealment and the revelation, where at one time, the bottom Hey is disclosed, and another time the bottom Hey is concealed, not showing its power. (Inner Light, Item 6)
